description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the chilio/laravel-dusk-ci:latest Docker image and a mysql:5.7 service, with variables DB_HOST, MYSQL_DATABASE, MYSQL_USER, MYSQL_PASSWORD, MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD, and DOCKER_DRIVER. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that caches the vendor and node_modules directories keyed by ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}, then runs the commands: versions, composer install --prefer-dist --no-ansi --no-interaction --no-progress --no-scripts, and npm install. In the test stage add a test job that also caches vendor and node_modules (policy pull), runs npm run production, copies .env.example to .env, displays the .env file, runs configure-laravel, starts the nginx CI project with start-nginx-ci-project, executes ./vendor/phpunit/phpunit/phpunit -v --coverage-text --colors=never --stderr, and runs php artisan dusk --colors --debug, and always uploads the storage/logs, tests/Browser/screenshots, and tests/Browser/console directories as artifacts retained for 7 days.
